user.title: Connect to PS4 GoldHEN
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PS4. GoldHEN must be running with BinLoader and FTP services active.

data_description.ftp_port: GoldHEN FTP port used to verify connectivity (default: 2121)

error.ftp_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 FTP service. Check the IP and ensure GoldHEN is running.

init.title: PS4 GoldHEN Settings
init.description: Update the connection settings for your PS4 GoldHEN integration.

data_description.ftp_port: GoldHEN FTP port used to verify connectivity (default: 2121)

error.ftp_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 FTP service. Check the IP and ensure GoldHEN is running.
